name: Spinach Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz. package frozen spinach, cooked and drained
1 pound ricotta cheese or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions, green peppers, and garlic in oil until golden, stirring often.
2. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, parsley, oregano, and bay leaf. Simmer uncovered for 20 minutes.
3. Cook noodles according to package directions and drain.
4. Combine spinach, ricotta, egg, 1/4 cup of Parmesan, salt, and pepper.
5. Spoon a third of the tomato sauce in the bottom of a 2-quart flat baking pan.
6. Layer a third of the lasagna noodles, half the spinach-ricotta filling, half the mozzarella, and 1/4 cup of Parmesan.
7. Repeat layers using half of the remaining sauce and noodles, and all remaining filling.
8. Top with remaining noodles, sauce, Parmesan, and mozzarella. Cover tightly.
9. Freeze or refrigerate. Bring to room temperature.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes, covered. Turn off the heat.
11. Uncover and continue baking for 20 minutes. Let stand a few minutes before cutting to serve.
Better if made a day or two in advance.
